title: scrypto-audit-kit MCP tool contracts
description: Formal input/output contracts for the tools exposed by bin/mcp_server.py — the same functions the importable Python API exposes. Each tool descriptor mirrors the MCP tool shape (name, description, inputSchema, outputSchema); inputSchema and outputSchema are JSON Schema (draft 2020-12). Shared shapes live in $defs and are referenced with #/$defs/... — resolve them against this whole document. tests/test_tool_contracts.py keeps this file in lockstep with the live function signatures and validates real fixture output against these schemas, so the contract cannot silently drift from the code. The full report shape is audit-report.schema.json.

model.description: Analysis model: claude (Sonnet 4.6, default), deepseek (cheap broad scan), or both (cross-model).

counts.description: Findings per severity label. Unknown/blank labels may appear (the gate fail-safe) and are kept verbatim.

finding.description: One finding. Identical shape to a findings[] item in audit-report.schema.json.

id.description: F-### from the LLM pass, S-### from the static pass

class.description: one of the checklist class names

suggested_direction.description: remediation direction in prose — never a code patch

rule.description: static rule id, when source is static

passed.description: true when the worst finding is below the fail_on threshold

worst.description: highest severity present; null when there are no findings; 'unknown' for an unrecognised label

target.description: the method under test, or null for a whole-blueprint invariant

invariant.description: the property the test should assert

hint.description: how to set it up — becomes the todo!() body

attestationPayload.description: The AttestationInput the registry's attest() expects. Counts are clamped to u16.

source_hash.description: sha256 of the analyzed source — the deterministic anchor

report_hash.description: sha256 of the report.json — a fingerprint, not re-derivable for the LLM tier

wasm_hash.description: sha256 of the built blueprint wasm, or empty

manifest.description: Radix transaction manifest calling attest(); present only when component AND account were given

sourceSpan.description: The cited source (success) or an error describing why it could not be read.

snippet.description: the cited line marked with > plus surrounding context

oneOf.description: The pre-audit report per audit-report.schema.json, plus report_path.

errorResult.description: Returned (not raised) by the LLM-backed tools when a run produces no report.

tools.name: audit_package
tools.description: Run the full pre-audit (deterministic static pass + LLM checklist pass) over a Scrypto package and return structured findings + a report_path. Needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and a kit clone (it shells out to audit.sh).

tools.name: static_scan
tools.description: Run only the deterministic static rules — free, no API key, no toolchain. The cheap first pass; reproducible.

package_path.description: path to the Scrypto package (a dir with a src/ folder)

tools.name: propose_tests
tools.description: Generate compilable, #[ignore]d scrypto-test property-test scaffolds for the coverage gaps (auth negative-paths, happy paths, a value-conservation invariant) — free, no API. Read-only: it returns the scaffolds, never writes them into the package.

package_path.description: path to the Scrypto package (a dir with a src/ folder)

tools.name: attestation_payload
tools.description: Bridge a report.json to the L3 attestation registry: hashes, severity counts, level, and (with component + account) a Radix transaction manifest calling attest() — free, no API.

component.description: deployed registry component address (for the manifest)

wasm_path.description: optional path to the built blueprint wasm to hash

level.description: optional override for the derived level

tools.name: get_findings
tools.description: Read findings from an existing report.json, optionally filtered by minimum severity and/or status — cheap, no API.

severity_min.description: only findings at/above this severity ('' = no filter)

status.description: only findings with this status ('' = any)

tools.name: reaudit_diff
tools.description: Re-audit a package and diff against a baseline report — the verify step of the audit -> fix -> verify loop. Needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + a kit clone.

baseline_report_path.description: an earlier report.json to compare against

tools.name: gate
tools.description: Apply the severity gate to a report (or a directory of reports) — pass/fail at a threshold. Fails closed on a missing/malformed report. Cheap, no API.

report_path.description: a report.json or a directory of them

tools.name: get_checklist
tools.description: Return the kit's Scrypto vulnerability checklist (the 11 classes + concrete questions per class) as markdown. Cheap, no API.

tools.name: show_finding_source
tools.description: Show the source a finding cites, with the line marked, so you can verify a citation before acting on it. Cheap, no API.

package_path.description: the audited package dir (locations are relative to it; defaults to cwd)

context.description: lines of context above/below the cited line
